verdict: PASS. All required sections present and non-trivial (3 LO, 4 Intro, 5 Core Concepts ~700w, 6 Implementation, 9 Hands-On, 10 Key Takeaways). STRICT citation mode satisfied: all three resources cited and resolve, no fabricated markers, key claims in 5/6 carry [N]. No forward refs (calibration name-and-deferred to 8.6, bare mention). No scope_creep (accuracy imbalance caution held to ~2 sentences; no multi-class, ROC/AUC, macro/micro/weighted averaging, or PR-curves taught; 8.3/8.4 reuse is correct). Worked-example arithmetic verified CORRECT (acc 0.75, prec 0.67, rec 0.75, F1 0.71). Length ~1455w below deep floor (1800) — soft note only per established short-corpus pattern, not gated.

required_sections.detail: Section 3 (Learning Objectives), 4 (Introduction), 5 (Core Concepts, ~700w >=100), 10 (Key Takeaways) all present and non-trivial. Applied-topic sections 6 (Implementation, 6-step procedure) and 9 (Hands-On Exercise, fraud confusion matrix) also present. No placeholder strings in required sections.

sequence_drift.detail: In-scope newly introduced: confusion matrix (2x2), true negative, accuracy, accuracy formula, by-hand computation, all-cells-sum sanity check. Reused from 8.3 (precision, recall, FP, FN, TP, cost-of-error) and 8.4 (F1, harmonic mean) — all from prior topics, correct reuse. No forward-referenced or unknown terms taught.

length.detail: ~1455 words. Below deep-profile floor (1800). Per established week-8 intuition-only short-corpus pattern, length is a soft note not a gate — corpus reuses 8.3/8.4 as one-liners and the 20-case worked example carries depth without padding. Substance and required sections fully met.

topic_scope.detail: Headline (build/read a 2x2 confusion matrix + compute the four metrics by hand) honored exactly. Accuracy's imbalanced-data weakness held to ~2 sentences (line 68) — acceptable. No teaching of multi-class confusion matrices, ROC/AUC, macro/micro/weighted averaging, or precision-recall curves.

beginner_readability.detail: Zero-background audience baseline met. Terms defined on first use (TP/FP/FN/TN spelled and explained, confusion matrix lead-in via spam-filter analogy). Mnemonic for naming. Short sentences, active voice, 'you' address. No jargon dump, no academic hedging. Worked example shows every substitution.

worked_example_arithmetic.detail: Spot-checked all substitutions in the 20-case example. Sanity sum 6+2+3+9=20 correct. Accuracy=(6+9)/20=15/20=0.75 correct. Precision=6/(6+3)=6/9~0.67 correct. Recall=6/(6+2)=6/8=0.75 correct. F1=2*(0.67*0.75)/(0.67+0.75)=1.005/1.42~0.71 correct (intermediate 2*0.50/1.42 consistent). No arithmetic errors.
